name: Wheat Thins
recipeInstructions:
Wheat Thins
1. Mix the dry ingredients (flours, oil, and salt) in a blender or beat them together.
2. Gradually add water to form a thick batter.
3. Add liquid mixture to dry mixture, mixing just until combined.
4. Roll out on an un-oiled baking sheet as thin as possible, not more than 1/8 inch thick.
5. Mark with a knife for desired cracker size, but do not cut through.
6. Prick each cracker a few times with a fork.
7. Sprinkle lightly with salt or onion salt, if desired.
8. Bake at 350°F until crisp and light brown, about 30 minutes.
